discourage-apps-showing-account-to-logge: Discourage apps from showing my account to logged-out users
bluesky-profile-posts-visibility-logged-: Bluesky will not show your profile and posts to logged-out users. Other apps may not honor this request. This does not make your account private.
account-deactivation-notice: Your profile, posts, feeds, and lists will no longer be visible to other Bluesky users. You can reactivate your account at any time by logging in.
no-time-limit-for-deactivation: There is no time limit for account deactivation, come back any time.
change-handle-or-email-before-deactivati: If you're trying to change your handle or email, do so before you deactivate.
unique-name-app-password: Please enter a unique name for this app password or use our randomly generated one.
allow-access-direct-messages: Allow access to your direct messages
failed-create-app-password: Failed to create app password. Please try again.
use-app-password-sign-in: Use this to sign into the other app along with your handle.
security-warning-app-password: For security reasons, you won't be able to view this again. If you lose this app password, you'll need to generate a new one.
email-sent-notification: An email has been sent to
confirmation-code-instruction: . It includes a confirmation code which you can enter below.
verify-email-access: To disable the email 2FA method, please verify your access to the email address.
account-repository-download-info: Your account repository, containing all public data records, can be downloaded as a "CAR" file. This file does not include media embeds, such as images, or your private data, which must be fetched separately.
beta-feature-repository-exports: This feature is in beta. You can read more about repository exports in <0>this blogpost</0> .
custom-domain-info: If you have your own domain, you can use that as your handle. This lets you self-verify your identity. <0>Learn more here.</0>
wrong-did-error: Wrong DID returned from server. Received:
handle-verification-failed: Failed to verify handle. Please try again.
enter-domain-prompt: Enter the domain you want to use
dns-record-instruction: Add the following DNS record to your domain:
domain-record-creation-info: This should create a domain record at:
current-handle-reservation: Your current handle <0>{{sanitizeHandleCurrentAccountHandle}}</0>  will automatically remain reserved for you. You can switch back to it at any time from this account.
create-handle-option: Nevermind, create a handle for me
